summary: BTC rallied 8.3% from $68.1K to $73.8K over 7 days. Exchange inflows spiked Mar 9 (26.7K BTC) and Mar 12 (28.0K BTC), suggesting profit-taking at resistance levels. Despite inflows, price continued higher — indicating strong buy-side absorption. Bullish short-term.

analysis.keyInsight: Exchange inflows doubled (10.6K→28K) but price still rose $5.6K. Strong demand.
